LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FEDEX OFFICE AND PRINT SERVICES INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SLANDER OF TITLE AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONCEALMENT. LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED TO GIVE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY, IF SHE IS ABLE TO DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO PLEAD A RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES GIVING RISE TO A DUTY TO DISCLOSE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR # 11604

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS FEDEX OFFICE AND PRINT SERVICES INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT FEDEX HAD ADVANCE KNOWLEDGE OF MS. LANGUBAN'S UNFITNESS OR THAT SHE EXERCISED SUCH BROAD POWER THAT HER ACTIONS BIND THE CORPORATION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR # 11604

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-503332 WITH CASE CGC-11-512102
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT WINSTON LUM'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-503332 WITH CASE CGC-11-512102 is Granted. No opposition filed. LEAD CASE NUMBER IS 503332 AND CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR # 11604 =(302/HEK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANTS FEDEX OFFICE AND PRINT SERVICES INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT is Granted with leave to amend to plead facts showing that defendant Fedex had advance knowledge of Ms. Languban's unfitness or that she exercised such broad power that her actions bind the corporation. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR # 11604 =(302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT FEDEX OFFICE AND PRINT SERVICES INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled as to the fifth cause of action for slander of title and sustained with leave to amend as to the sixth cause of action for concealment. Leave to amend is granted to give plaintiff an opportunity, if she is able to do so in good faith, to plead a relationship between the parties giving rise to a duty to disclose. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR # 11604 =(302/HEK)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-503332 WITH CASE CGC-11-512102

DEFENDANT WINSTON LUM's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-503332 WITH CASE CGC-11-512102.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's motion to consolidate actions of Case(s) CGC-10-503332 with Case CGC-11-512102 is continued to October 27, 2011 per agreement of parties. The moving party is to provide courtesy copies in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
